verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus David.   Domine, quis habitabit in tabernaculo tuo ?  aut quis requiescet in monte sancto tuo ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֗וֹר לְדָ֫וִ֥ד יְ֭הֹוָה מִי־יָג֣וּר בְּאׇהֳלֶ֑ךָ מִֽי־יִ֝שְׁכֹּ֗ן בְּהַ֣ר קׇדְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: A psalm for David. Lord, who shall dwell in thy tabernacle? or who shall rest in thy holy hill?
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi. Herra, kuka asuu sinun majassas? eli kuka on pysyväinen sinun pyhällä vuorellas?
verses.king_james: Lord, who shall abide in thy tabernacle? who shall dwell in thy holy hill?

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ingreditur sine macula,  et operatur justitiam ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹלֵ֣ךְ תָּ֭מִים וּפֹעֵ֥ל צֶ֑דֶק וְדֹבֵ֥ר אֱ֝מֶ֗ת בִּלְבָבֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that walketh without blemish, and worketh justice:
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka vaeltaa ja tekee oikeuden, ja puhuu totuuden sydämestänsä;
verses.king_james: He that walketh uprightly, and worketh righteousness, and speaketh the truth in his heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui loquitur veritatem in corde suo :  qui non egit dolum in lingua sua,  nec fecit proximo suo malum,  et opprobrium non accepit adversus proximos suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־רָגַ֨ל ׀ עַל־לְשֹׁנ֗וֹ לֹא־עָשָׂ֣ה לְרֵעֵ֣הוּ רָעָ֑ה וְ֝חֶרְפָּ֗ה לֹא־נָשָׂ֥א עַל־קְרֹבֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that speaketh truth in his heart, who hath not used deceit in his tongue: Nor hath done evil to his neighbour: nor taken up a reproach against his neighbours.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka ei kielellänsä panettele, eikä lähimmäisellensä mitään pahaa tee, ja ei häpäise lähimmäistänsä;
verses.king_james: He that backbiteth not with his tongue, nor doeth evil to his neighbour, nor taketh up a reproach against his neighbour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad nihilum deductus est in conspectu ejus malignus ;  timentes autem Dominum glorificat.  Qui jurat proximo suo, et non decipit ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִבְזֶ֤ה ׀ בְּֽעֵ֘ינָ֤יו נִמְאָ֗ס וְאֶת־יִרְאֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֣ה יְכַבֵּ֑ד נִשְׁבַּ֥ע לְ֝הָרַ֗ע וְלֹ֣א יָמִֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: In his sight the malignant is brought to nothing: but he glorifieth them that fear the Lord. He that sweareth to his neighbour, and deceiveth not;
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka jumalattomat katsoo ylön, vaan kunnioittaa Jumalaa pelkääväisiä; joka lähimmäisellensä vannoo ja pitää.
verses.king_james: In whose eyes a vile person is contemned; but he honoureth them that fear the Lord. He that sweareth to his own hurt, and changeth not.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui pecuniam suam non dedit ad usuram,  et munera super innocentem non accepit :  qui facit hæc non movebitur in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּסְפּ֤וֹ ׀ לֹא־נָתַ֣ן בְּנֶשֶׁךְ֮ וְשֹׁ֥חַד עַל־נָקִ֗י לֹ֥א־לָ֫קָ֥ח עֹֽשֵׂה־אֵ֑לֶּה לֹ֖א יִמּ֣וֹט לְעוֹלָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: He that hath not put out his money to usury, nor taken bribes against the innocent: He that doth these things, shall not be moved for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka ei anna rahaansa korolle, eikä ota lahjoja viatointa vastaan. Joka näin tekee, ei hän horjahda ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: He that putteth not out his money to usury, nor taketh reward against the innocent. He that doeth these things shall never be moved.
